[News] Co-op กับเพื่อน เปิดร้านเวทมนตร์ ช่วยกันปรุงยา แต่งร้าน บริหารชิลๆ ใน Witch Shop Simulator 
.
Waczjo Games S.A. และ Game Discovery ร่วมกันเปิดตัว Witch Shop Simulator เกม Co-op รับบทเป็นแม่มด เก็บวัตถุดิบ ปรุงยาและนำมาขายในร้านค้าเวทมนตร์ของตัวเอง โดยตัวเกมจะวางจำหน่ายบน Steam ในช่วงไตรมาสที่ 3 ของปี 2026 
.
Witch Shop Simulator จะให้คุณสวมบทเป็นแม่มด และบริหารจัดการร้านค้าเวทมนตร์ของตัวเอง ในมุมมองบุคคลที่ 1 แบบชิลๆ ที่เน้นความเพลิดเพลินจากการบริหารร้านให้ลงตัว และการปรุงยาที่สมบูรณ์แบบ
.
รวบรวมวัตถุดิบ นำมาผสมตามสูตร และสร้างสรรค์ยาวิเศษหลากหลายชนิด ยาแต่ละขวดที่คุณปรุงคือสินค้าที่พร้อมวางขาย เพื่อให้ลูกค้าประจำอีก 1 คนของคุณ ที่อาจจะเป็นมนุษย์ มังกร หรือวิญญาณเร่ร่อน ออกจากร้านไปอย่างพึงพอใจ
.
จัดระเบียบชั้นวาง ดูแลคลังสินค้า และทำให้แน่ใจว่าสินค้าไม่ขาดสต๊อก แม่มดที่ดีต้องรู้จักของในร้านพอๆ กับที่รู้จักคาถาของตัวเอง
.
ไม่มีการต่อสู้ ไม่มีแรงกดดัน มีเพียงจังหวะชิลๆ แสนสบายของร้านที่คุณค่อยๆ เติบโต ตกแต่งร้าน สร้างแคตตาล็อกสินค้า และใช้ชีวิตกับธุรกิจเล็กๆ ที่เต็มไปด้วยเวทมนตร์
.
แสงไฟอบอุ่น หม้อต้มที่เดือดปุดๆ และชั้นวางที่เต็มไปด้วยขวดยาแปลกตา Witch Shop Simulator ออกแบบมาให้รู้สึกร้านค้าแห่งนี้ เป็นเหมือนมุมเล็กๆ แสนอบอุ่นในโลกเวทมนตร์อันกว้างใหญ่
.
คุณจะต้องคอยจัดสมดุลทรัพยากร ปลดล็อกตัวเลือกใหม่ๆ ควบคุมทุกอย่างด้วยตัวเอง แต่จะไม่มีเวลามาเร่ง มีแค่คุณ หม้อต้มยา และเสียงเหรียญของลูกค้าที่กระทบกันด้วยความพอใจ
.
Witch Shop Simulator คือเกมสำหรับทุกคนที่เคยฝันอยากมีธุรกิจเวทมนตร์เล็กๆ เป็นของตัวเอง ไม่มีกำหนดเวลา ไม่มีหน้าจอ Game Over มีเพียงร้านแสนอบอุ่น แคตตาล็อกสินค้าที่เติบโตขึ้นเรื่อยๆ และมนต์เสน่ห์เงียบๆ ของวันที่ใช้ไปอย่างคุ้มค่า  
.

kept.text:
I think about this often: the fact that the entire history of humanity, from the discovery of fire until now, has been underscored by tremendous amounts of violence and conquest. The implication is one that makes some academics uncomfortable, because it chips away at a kumbaya-driven narrative of history when in reality that history was driven by the phalanx, the chariot, the longbow, and the sling.

It’s only for the past hundred years or so that we’ve been preoccupied with trying to mask this reality. This was largely a reaction to the two World Wars and the counterbalance they produced. The opposite swing resulted in the birth and enshrinement of international law: the Geneva Conventions, the United Nations, the ICJ, the ICC. The list goes on.

But these outbursts of destruction, while novel in their modernity and the technology that fueled them, weren’t unprecedented in terms of the death and devastation they left behind. Genghis Khan’s conquests killed an estimated 20 to 40 million people, and when the Mongols sacked Baghdad in 1258, contemporary chroniclers placed the death toll in the hundreds of thousands, with some claims running to a million.

Going further back, we have entire species of humans snuffed out by competition with our ancestors - or at least coinciding suspiciously with their arrival. Neanderthals, Denisovans, Homo erectus, Homo floresiensis, and others both known and unknown to us.

So why this recent change of heart? Why try to constrain the violence and put a lid on all of this after the World Wars? The answer, I think, is Western liberalism.

The Renaissance in Europe birthed a wave of humanism, study, and art that changed the way Europe saw and interacted with the world. The catch was that this flourishing occurred alongside bouts of tremendous violence in the 14th through 17th centuries. The Hundred Years’ War and the Thirty Years’ War - two examples among many - overlapped with this period and stood in stark contrast to the humanistic ideals the Renaissance promulgated.

The Enlightenment followed, with thinkers like Hobbes and Voltaire writing about how fanaticism leads to unchecked violence. Hobbes argued that a strong sovereign was needed to suppress humanity’s base instincts and prevent the kind of religious and civil violence he had witnessed in the English Civil War.

It’s from these Western thinkers - and from the tradition of liberalism born in the Renaissance and built up during the Enlightenment - that we see the seedlings of modern international law. 

The World Wars stood juxtaposed to that tradition just as the violence of the early modern period had stood in dichotomy to Renaissance ideals.
The pendulum swung hard against modern violence as a result, and the institutions we know today have seen a boon to their authority because of it. On its face, this is a good thing. They attempt to prevent violence, punish those who engage in it irresponsibly, and codify the rules of warfare.

But the system has weak points. It’s predicated on everyone following the rules and agreeing to them - for it to work, everyone has to sign on. 

It struggles to address subversion and politicization from within. And by the nature of its mandate, it tries to prevent the current status quo from shifting. Put differently, it can incentivize forever wars rather than conclusions.

This is unprecedented in the entire history of humanity. No doubt these institutions, with their roots in liberalism, were born with noble intentions in a different time. But one has to wonder what Locke, Voltaire, or Hobbes would make of this new normal and whether a different price is being paid because of it.

It revealed that light behaves as particles (photons) with energy ( E = h f ), where ( h ) is Planck's constant and ( f ) is the frequency. This discovery, explained by Einstein, revolutionized physics and confirmed quantum theory.

kept.text:
Built a fun little project this weekend: surface-watch

It’s a lightweight external attack surface monitoring framework that builds scope from known FQDNs and IPs plus automatic root-domain discovery using passive providers like DNSDumpster, Chaos, and OTX, resolves candidate hosts, scans externally reachable ports with nmap, stores history in SQLite, detects meaningful changes between scans, and sends grouped alerts to Slack, Teams, or Discord

I also added an AGENTS.md setup guide so you can just point your agent at the repo, answer a few setup questions, and get going pretty quickly

tweet.text:
TAKİPCİLERİN SORDUĞU 50 HİSSE ;  

#MEGMT için bu haftasında en kritik takip noktası 82,45 TL seviyesindeki tarihi zirvedir. Hafta başında bu seviyenin hacimli bir şekilde geçilmesi, hissede hızlı bir fiyat keşfi sürecini (price discovery) tetikleyebilir ve 85,00 - 88,00 bandını kısa sürede gündeme getirebilir. Olası kâr satışlarında 80,33 TL pivot seviyesi ilk destek olarak izlenmelidir. 78,00 TL altına sarkılmadığı sürece yükseliş trendinin bozulması beklenmez.

#BIOEN için bu haftasında en önemli sınav 20,15 TL pivot seviyesinin üzerine hızlıca geri dönmektir. Eğer hafta başında bu seviye korunursa, doğrudan 20,48 TL direnci test edilecektir. Yatırımcılar için asıl büyük hareket, nisan sonu itibarıyla zorlanmaya başlanan 21,60 TL direncinin aşılmasıyla başlayabilir. Olası geri çekilmelerde 19,80 – 19,90 TL bandı "onay alımı" (pullback) bölgesi olarak izlenebilir.

#ARTMS Analistlerin dikkat çektiği TOBO formasyonunda sağ omuz tamamlanmak üzere. Eğer 45,58 TL direnci aşılırsa teknik hedef olarak önce 58,00 TL, orta vadede ise daha üst zirveler gündeme gelebilir.

#EMKEL için bu haftasında en kritik takip noktası 26,00 – 26,20 TL bandının üzerinde kalıcılıktır. Eğer haftaya bu bölgenin üzerinde başlanırsa, ilk hedef doğrudan 27,30 TL direnci olacaktır. Bu seviyenin geçilmesi durumunda 29,50 – 30,00 TL bandına doğru sert bir marj açılabilir. Olası kâr satışlarında 25,72 TL (Pivot) ve ardından 25,10 TL seviyeleri "onay alımı" (pullback) için takip edilebilir.

#ADESE Hissenin 1,05 TL üzerinde kalıcılık sağlaması, satış baskısının yerini "akümülasyona" (toplanma) bıraktığını gösteriyor. 4 Mayıs haftasında 1,12 TL üzerine yapılacak bir hamle, hacmin artmasıyla birlikte yeni bir ralli tetikleyebilir.

#USAK için bu haftasında en önemli takip noktası 1,73 TL pivot seviyesinin üzerinde kalınmasıdır. Hafta başında bu seviyenin korunması durumunda doğrudan 1,81 TL direnci hedef olacaktır. Eğer bu bölge hacimli bir şekilde aşılabilirse, 1,90 – 1,96 TL bandına doğru hızlı bir marj oluşabilir. Aşağıda ise 1,69 TL desteği ilk savunma hattı olup, 1,62 TL altındaki kapanışlar stratejinin stoplanmasını gerektirebilir.

#BERA için bu haftasında en önemli takip noktası 17,03 TL pivot seviyesidir. Hafta başında bu seviyenin korunması durumunda doğrudan 17,42 TL direnci hedeflenecektir. Bu direncin aşılması, nisan ayındaki baskının bittiğini ve 18,00 TL üzerine doğru bir hareketin başladığını teyit edebilir. Aşağıda ise 16,70 TL desteği stop-loss seviyesi olarak yakından izlenmelidir.

#EGEGY için bu haftasında takip edilecek en önemli rakam 30,52 TL pivot seviyesidir. Haftaya bu seviyenin üzerinde başlanması, doğrudan 31,54 TL direncini hedef yapacaktır. Bu direncin hacimli kırılması, hissedeki nisan ayı durgunluğunu tamamen bitirip 33,00 TL bandına doğru hızlı bir "fiyat keşfi" başlatabilir. Aşağıda ise 29,96 TL desteği ilk savunma hattı olarak izlenmelidir; bu seviyenin altındaki kapanışlar pozisyon azaltmayı gerektirebilir.

#KCAER için bu haftasında en önemli takip noktası 11,70 TL pivot seviyesidir. Hafta başında bu seviyenin üzerinde kalınması, doğrudan 12,04 TL direncini hedef yapacaktır. Eğer bu direnç bölgesi hacimli bir şekilde geçilirse, 12,50 – 12,85 TL bandına doğru hızlı bir yükseliş süreci başlayabilir. Aşağıda ise 11,48 TL desteği ilk savunma hattı olarak izlenmelidir.
